address: 35, Block Colony Main Road, near Maharashtra Bank, Tamia, Madhya Pradesh 480559

reviews.name: Divyesh Saglani
reviews.text: What an amazing place, high plateau, where you can trek, the plateau would have be around 1000 feet deep, a nice place for adventurers, can't be completed in single day, so I would prefer one to go in weekends, with various other …

reviews.name: Amit Ninawe
reviews.text: The view point was better previously when there was no fencing due to private entity. Now only a part of it can be accessed and main part is closed for tourists

reviews.name: Rushikesh
reviews.text: Amazing place to visit. Must walk down the hill and climb again. Great experience.

reviews.name: Subhash kumre
reviews.text: ♥️Very good place and great experience with natura. ♥️

reviews.name: MANISHA RAJPUT
reviews.text: Most beautiful, natural and calming place
